original_text: coupon code malfunction - no coupons are being accepted!!
author: Dpjrczz03
repro_steps:
1. Go to checkout.
2. Enter any valid coupon code.
3. Observe that the coupon is not accepted.

original_text: coupon code button does not work! - when a correct coupon code is entered, the website reloads and goes back to home page!
author: Dpjrczz03
repro_steps:
1. Enter a correct coupon code.
2. Click the coupon code button.
3. Observe: Website reloads and goes back to the home page.

original_text: add to card button does not work - when the user clicks on add to cart button, he/she is redirected to the home page and the cart stays empty!
author: Dpjrczz03
repro_steps:
1. Navigate to any product page.
2. Click the "Add to Cart" button.
3. Observe redirection to the home page and an empty cart.
